input.background: Test the slope in the smoking and lung cancer illustrative data for statistical significance. There are 11 bivariate observations. Established values are $b=0.02284$ and $S E_b=0.006976$.
input.question: What is the P-value and its interpretation?

b.description: The estimated slope of the relationship between smoking and lung cancer.

SE_b.description: The standard error of the estimated slope b.

n.description: The number of bivariate observations in the data set.
